# claude_memory (Resource)

A single memory (text document at a path) inside a memory store. Intended for **seeding** stores with reference material and managing read-only content. Note: agents write to `read_write` stores at runtime, so managing memories in a store the agent also writes to will surface out-of-band changes as drift on the next plan.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) UTF-8 text content (max 100 kB). Pass an empty string for an empty memory.
- `memory_store_id` (String) ID of the memory store this memory belongs to.
- `path` (String) Hierarchical path, e.g. `/preferences/formatting.md`. Must start with `/`. Changing it renames the memory in place.

### Read-Only

- `content_sha256` (String) SHA-256 of the content bytes. Used as an optimistic-concurrency precondition on update.
- `content_size_bytes` (Number) Content size in bytes.
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `memory_version_id` (String) ID of the current memory version.
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
